stem: The surface area of a cube is 24b, where b is a positive constant. Which of the following gives the perimeter of one face of the cube?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. A cube has 6 congruent square faces, so each face has area 24b/6 = 4b. If s is the side length of a face, then s2 = 4b, so s = 2√b. The perimeter of one face is 4s = 8√b.

Choice A gives the side length, not the perimeter. Choice B gives twice the side. Choice C arises from arithmetic error.
